plugins.name: zapad-js-stack
plugins.description: The canonical Zapad TypeScript web stack: TanStack Start on AWS serverless (Lambda), Prisma + Postgres, Better Auth, MUI. Defaults and invariants for scaffolding and architecture decisions.

plugins.name: zapad-laravel-backend
plugins.description: Zapad's canonical Laravel backend architecture: single-action controllers, an Actions layer, Form Requests, domain exceptions, and Pest testing conventions. Covers project structure, coding guidelines, the new-feature workflow, and testing.
